mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_link_locale_stats (full_short_url, gid, date, cnt, province, city, adcode, country, create_time, update_time, del_flag) VALUES (#{fullShortUrl}, #{gid}, #{date}, #{cnt}, #{province}, #{city}, #{adcode}, #{country}, NOW(), NOW(), 0) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE cnt = cnt + VALUES(cnt), update_time = NOW()
